semantic.role: Test suite for the core task-state module, validating its contract and ensuring structural integrity of TypeScript sources.
responsibilities: Validate that createTaskState returns an object with expected keys (version, status, timestamp) for a given mode.
Verify that all TypeScript files under src/ and tests/ directories are parseable by the TypeScript compiler, ensuring no syntax errors in the codebase.
outOfScope: Does not test the runtime behavior of createTaskState beyond its static shape.
Does not test error handling or edge cases of the task-state module.
Does not cover application-level integration or end-to-end scenarios.
invariants: All test files must follow the naming convention .test.ts or .spec.ts to comply with project rules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This test file ensures the core state factory produces a consistent structure and that the project's TypeScript sources remain syntactically valid.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No intent provided; previous git commit message is non-informative.
